prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFPSEMCC-STD-RD-3 Product Type: ELLIPTICAL_TRAINER Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness Poster Series Elliptical Machine Conditioning Chart Description: Whether you are a complete Elliptical novice or an experienced user, this poster will ensure each run, walk or jog is successful and safe.

Bullet points highlight the important aspects of proper posture, safety and the use of Elliptical components. If you're a complete beginner you'll learn the best way to safely get started.

The chart describes how to set up your workout, what muscles are being used (displayed in a colorful muscle anatomy drawing), how to select the correct heart range based on your fitness goals, and a series of safety points.

This poster is the perfect guide to have mounted next to the elliptical for both motivation and explanation. It is laminated and measures 24" x 36" Search Terms: home gym exercise workout basics Features: - Dimensions: 24" x 36" - Laminated - Written & Designed by Fitness Experts - Intended to Teach Proper Exercise Technique & Form - Detailed w/ Easy To Follow Step by Step Instructions === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
